title: Statistical Tokenization
content:
# Statistical Tokenization

## 1. WordPiece Selection Score
$$\text{Score}(A, B) = \frac{\text{count}(AB)}{\text{count}(A) \times \text{count}(B)}$$
*   Prioritizes pairs that maximize pointwise mutual information rather than raw frequency.

## 2. SentencePiece Lossless Detokenization
$$\text{detok}(\text{tokens}) = \text{replace}(\text{join}(\text{tokens}), \text{'_'}, \text{' '})$$
*   Preserves spaces as explicit characters, enabling reversible detokenization.
